event: Alleyway in the Park of Saint Cloud
description: A symmetrical tree-lined avenue stretches into the distance, with tall deciduous trees forming a dense green canopy on both sides. Small figures in dark and light clothing walk along the path. At the far end, a pale architectural structure is visible through the opening in the trees. The sky above is blue-green. The overall effect is one of depth and ordered tranquility, with the path drawing the eye toward the vanishing point.

_meta.title: Alleyway in the Park of Saint Cloud
